title: phyllostegia parviflora
intro: Phyllostegia parviflora, also known as Maui false lilac, is a flowering shrub native to Hawaii. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Phyllostegia parviflora can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
